chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln No.S-170 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case For orders on MA No.2560/2025 (U/A) 26-5-2025 Mr. Muhammad Rafique Kalwar, Advocate for the applicant -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant files statement along with photocopy of order 29.03.2025 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I (MCTC), Ghotki in Cr. Bail Application No.473 of 2025, taken on record. Learned Counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application. In view of above, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed, along with listed application. JUDGE Naveed Ali
